# Martenweave

> Martenweave is an open-source, backend-first model governance and evidence layer for SAP migration, MDM, data governance, and AMS. It turns spreadsheets, datasets, tickets, validation reports, decisions, and SAP context into canonical model files, deterministic validation, generated indexes, gap detection, lineage, impact analysis, and human-approved AI patch proposals.

Current core: `martenweave-core` version `0.6.1`, Python 3.11+, licensed under Apache License 2.0.

Canonical Markdown and YAML model files are the source of truth. SQLite, JSONL, and local generated read-only viewer artifacts are derived and rebuildable.

Agents propose. Validators verify. Humans approve. Git records. AI and import workflows create reviewable `PatchProposal` objects; they do not silently mutate canonical model files.

Martenweave has no direct SAP write-back. The generated viewer is local/static/read-only and not a hosted UI, login surface, editor, or SAP write-back path. Martenweave is not a chatbot, generic SaaS dashboard, generic AI workflow builder, enterprise MDM replacement, workflow engine, n8n/Zapier/Dify competitor, generic data catalog, SAP product, or SAP-affiliated product.

Maintainer: Dzmitryi Kharlanau. Author profile: https://martenweave.github.io/docs/author.html

## Official links

- Website: https://martenweave.github.io/
- Documentation: https://martenweave.github.io/docs.html
- Core source: https://github.com/metalhatscats/martenweave-core
- Website source: https://github.com/Martenweave/martenweave.github.io
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/martenweave-core/
- Full AI context: https://martenweave.github.io/llms-full.txt
- Machine-readable identity: https://martenweave.github.io/ai.json
- Blog RSS feed: https://martenweave.github.io/feed.xml
